verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My soul magnifies the Lord, My spirit rejoices in God my Savior, My soul magnifies the Lord, My spirit rejoices in God.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Glory be to God the Father, And glory be to God the Son, Glory be to God the Spirit, Glory be to God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He has been mindful of His servant, He has been mindful of me, I will be blessed forever forever, I will be blessed by the Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God alone is mighty, mighty, Our God alone has done great things, God alone is worthy worthy, Holy is His name.
